2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 31
Date 22 May 2026
Time 19:00
Title Infringement - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed CAN DOC 31 - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 31 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  22 May 2026 
 
        Time  19:00 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Sprint Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 2, 3, 4, 8, 10 and 14. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day  Lap Time 
1 2 44  Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 16:34:32 1:26.505 
2 2 16  Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 16:36:06 1:35.328 
3 14 63 George Russell Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 16:37:23 1:18.246 
4 14 63 George Russell Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 16:37:23 1:40.999 
5 8 16 Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 16:38:14 1:32.072 
6 3 6 Isack Hadj
